title: Sealed Doors
description: Turns all doors into fully solid versions with no holes or gaps.
body:
# **Sealed Doors**

**Sealed Doors transforms every door and trapdoor into a fully solid, gapless version, giving your builds a cleaner and more polished look.**

## Vanilla:

![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4142c6f3c0355d47ed5da096deed5709c36c1d29.png)

## With Sealed Doors:

![Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2786b68008dffcf0ab8dffaafd47c0a2cdab7698.png)

**Whether you’re building a castle, a modern house, or just a cozy survival base, your doors will finally look the way they should.**

# Enjoy

**-Lordd727**
